unauthorized: You need to sign in to see this

validation.invalidPhone: Invalid phone. Use country code + number

inactive.title: your subscription is
inactive.description: To use Método TTS you need an active subscription. Ready to reactivate?

trial.title: your trial
trial.description: Your trial days are over. To continue, just subscribe — your full account (products, scripts, routine) stays saved and comes right back.

canceled.title: your plan was
canceled.description: Your paid period ended. Your product sheets and scripts are still safe — when you renew, everything is exactly where you left it.

refunded.title: your plan was
refunded.description: We processed your refund and your app access was closed. If you changed your mind, you can subscribe again any time.

chargeback.title: access
chargeback.description: We detected a bank chargeback on your purchase. To resolve, reply to any Método TTS email.

sameEmail.headline: Use THIS email at checkout
sameEmail.subtitle: If you use a different email, Kiwify creates a new account and your progress stays stuck here. The link already opens with your email pre-filled — just double-check before paying.
